en: Well, I think since I last was on Radio 1, I got to meet Beyonce a couple of times, which
ko: 제가 마지막으로 Radio 1에 나온 후로, 비욘세를 몇 번 만났는데

en: the first time I really held it together, I was like, thanks for having me to the show,
ko: 처음에는 잘 참았어요. 쇼에 초대해 주셔서 감사합니다,

en: B, you know, rah, rah, rah.
The thing is, I was in her dressing room, and there was only a little curtain separating
ko: 근데 대기실에 있었는데, 커튼 하나만 사이에 두고

en: us while she was having her makeup done, and I started going, I don't think I can do this,
ko: 메이크업 받고 있을 때, 나도 모르게 이럴 수 없어, 이럴 수 없어, 라고 중얼거렸고

en: I don't think I can do this.
And she would have heard it all.
ko: 그녀가 나왔을 때 용감한 척했는데, 두 번째 만났을 때는 발코니에 나가서

en: And then she popped out, so I put on a brave face, but the second time, I went out on a
balcony and got on my hands and knees and cried.
